title: Reviewing protocol of SLR on Antecedents of Expatriates Going Abroad
author: Strzelec, Gabriela
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
This is a review protocol outlining the steps of a systematic literature review on the antecedents influencing the decision of assignment self-initiated expatriates to go abroad.   
  The review included academic literature, and the collection and analysis of data took place from May to August 2024.
steps_raw:
This is a review protocol outlining the steps of a systematic literature review on the antecedents influencing the decision of assignment self-initiated expatriates to go abroad.   
  The review included academic literature, and the collection and analysis of data took place from May to August 2024.
